nasb.text: He also built upper Beth-horon and lower Beth-horon, fortified cities with walls, gates and bars;

esv.text: He also built Upper Beth-horon and Lower Beth-horon, fortified cities with walls, gates, and bars,

cnv.text: 他又建造上伯．和崙和下伯．和崙，成了有牆、有門和有閂的設防城；

ccb.text: 把上伯·和仑与下伯·和仑建成有墙、有门、有闩的坚城，
